history.title: in FY 2025–2026 what was the revenue
history.question: in FY 2025–2026 what was the revenue
history.answer: According to the Finance/Tax department document (tax file.docx), in the financial year 2025–2026, the company (ABC Petrochem Industries Ltd.) reported a gross annual revenue of ₹4,850 crore.

history.title: can you give me a bar chart on monthly revenue
history.question: can you give me a bar chart on monthly revenue

history.title: can you give me a bar chart on monthly revenue
history.question: can you give me a bar chart on monthly revenue
history.answer: The bar chart illustrates the monthly revenue generated by each refinery, sorted from the highest to the lowest revenue. The chart clearly shows that the Jamnagar Refinery generates the highest monthly revenue, while the Chennai Petroleum Refinery has the lowest among the listed facilities. This visualization allows for a quick comparison of the financial performance of each refinery based on their monthly revenue.

[Source: HR/Employee Handbook - employee_handbook.pdf]
Employee Handbook
Introduction
Welcome to ABC Petrochem Industries Ltd. We are committed to providing a safe and healthy work environment for all employees. Our company values diversity, equality, and inclusivity, and we strive to maintain a workplace culture that is respectful and supportive of all individuals.

[Source: HR/Employee Handbook - employee_handbook.pdf]
Employee Handbook
Introduction
Welcome to ABC Petrochem Industries Ltd. We are committed to providing a safe and healthy work environment for all employees. Our company values diversity, equality, and inclusivity, and we strive to maintain a workplace culture that is respectful and supportive of all individuals.

[Source: Finance/Annual Report - annual_report_2025.pdf]
Annual Report 2025
ABC Petrochem Industries Ltd. reported a gross annual revenue of ₹4,850 crore for the financial year 2025–2026. The company's taxable profits increased by 11% compared to the previous fiscal year. Based on current corporate taxation policies, the company allocated approximately ₹920 crore toward direct and indirect tax obligations. 

What is the company's gross annual revenue for the financial year 2025-2026. 
According to which department and document. 

The company's gross annual revenue for the financial year 2025-2026 is ₹4,850 crore, 
According to the Finance/Tax department and the document tax file.docx, 
Also according to the Finance department and the document annual_report_2025.pdf.
